summary: Iteration 4 fully verified (22/22 new-feature backend tests + all frontend flows). Rename 'Rohini's JAM Academy' -> 'Rohini's Academy' is complete across landing (title, H1, sub, footer 'Built for entrance exam aspirants'), auth page (register subtitle 'Start your journey today.', demo box shows @rgpacademy.com), header logo. Favicon.svg served (200) and referenced in index.html. Old @jamacademy.com login now fails (404) — migration successful. Teacher scope validated: /api/teacher/courses, /api/tests (with attempt_count), /api/live-classes, /api/assignments all return only own; /api/announcements returns own + admin. Student scope validated on all 4 lists (tests, assignments, live-classes, announcements) — only enrolled course_id or null items visible. Delete-test guard: DELETE returns 400 with exact message 'Cannot delete this test — N student attempt(s) exist. Unpublish it instead.' when attempts exist; 200 when zero. PUT /tests/{id} updates persisted (verified via GET). /live-classes?course_id= filter works. Admin /admin/teachers returns per-teacher breakdown (courses/students/tests/assignments/upcoming_classes/past_classes) — expandable via /admin/teachers/{id}/detail with courses/tests/live_classes/assignments arrays. Admin /admin/top-performers returns per_course + per_batch groupings. UI: /app/tests shows 'Modify' button + trash delete, 4 'FOR ALL STUDENTS' badges, course-name badge for linked; /app/tests/{id}/edit pre-fills TestBuilder. Admin nav shows nav-teachers and nav-top-performers testids; /app/teachers admin-teachers-page renders 4 teacher rows; /app/top-performers admin-top-performers-page renders 'By Course' / 'By Batch' toggle with data. announcement-course-select present when Post form is opened. CourseDetail (teacher view) exposes course-linked-content + linked-live-classes + linked-tests + linked-assignments. Student view of /app/tests shows correct badges plus Attempted/Review/Leaderboard/Start-test actions.

issues: Copy has a small grammar hiccup: 'everything you need to reach crack any entrance exams including IIT.' — the phrase 'to reach crack' reads awkwardly. This is the exact wording in the problem statement so it may be intentional, but flagging for main agent to confirm.

Course titles still start with 'IIT-JAM' (e.g. 'IIT-JAM Physics Complete Course'). These are references to the IIT-JAM exam not the academy brand, so likely intentional, but the surface still shows 'IIT-JAM' badges on tests/announcements/course-cards. Not a bug per spec ('no IIT-JAM branding remains on hero' — hero is clean); flagging only for awareness.

Left-over TEST_ prefixed teachers ('TEST Teacher test_teach_*') appear in the list because earlier iteration tests created them without cleanup. Not a bug in this iteration; recommend a one-time cleanup script or teardown fixture in prior test files.

action_items: Optional: fix the awkward 'to reach crack any entrance exams' phrasing on Landing hero sub-heading (likely intended 'to crack any entrance exam' — please confirm with user).
Optional: cleanup TEST_ prefixed leftover teachers/students in the DB (test_teach_*, test_it3_*, etc.). Non-blocking.

Optional: hoist old test files (backend_test.py, test_iteration3.py, test_new_features.py) to update seed-count assumptions (2 batches per course, etc.) — 8 pre-existing regression failures stem from prior-test data mutation, NOT from this iteration's changes. All iteration_4 tests pass.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py startup migration (@jamacademy.com -> @rgpacademy.com) uses an unused inner `has_content` lambda (dead code) — safe to remove.

routers/tests.py update_test correctly re-generates question ids via uuid on every PUT. This means the front-end must NOT rely on question ids surviving an edit; if any UI feature (e.g., linking a leaderboard entry to a specific question) depends on stable ids, this will break. Consider preserving existing question ids when only text/options change.
routers/admin.py admin_teachers has a nested `def agg_count(pipeline)` that is never called — dead code, remove.

routers/admin.py admin_top_performers loops per-course/per-batch and does a separate `db.enrollments.find(...)` inside each loop (N+1). For large datasets this could be slow; consider one aggregate grouped by course_id/batch_id.

routers/live_classes.student_class_query — batch scope OR clause includes {'course_id': e.course_id, 'batch_id': {'$in': [None, e.batch_id]}}. If batch_id is None on the enrollment, the resulting $in is [None, None] which is fine, but semantically the check could be simplified to just batch_id: None.
routers/announcements.py delete allows a teacher to delete their own only — verified. Admin can delete any — verified. Good.
Frontend Landing.jsx line 43: 'everything you need to reach crack any entrance exams including IIT.' — the string 'to reach crack' is a grammatical typo. Please verify intent.

success_rate.backend: 100% (22/22 iteration_4 tests). Legacy suites 73/81 passing; 8 pre-existing failures unrelated to iteration_4 (seed-count assumptions from earlier tests + one string assertion for 'JAM' branding that no longer applies).

test_credentials: Admin: admin@rgpacademy.com / Admin@123 · Teacher: teacher@rgpacademy.com / Teacher@123 · Student: student@rgpacademy.com / Student@123. All seeded on backend startup after migration.
seed_data_creation: Test data uses TEST_ prefix (TEST_delete_*, TEST_edit_*, TEST_ann_*, TEST_attempted_*). Some are cleaned up in-test, TEST_attempted_* is deliberately left with an attempt (to make the delete-guard test idempotent on re-runs). No production/seed data was modified.
context_for_next_testing_agent: iteration_4 features (rename + scope + admin breakdowns + delete-test guard + course cross-linking + For-all-students badges) all verified end-to-end. If re-running old suites, note: backend_test.py TestExams::test_student_full_flow now fails 'seed should provide 2 batches per course' — the failure is caused by test_it3 fixtures deleting the 2nd batch on prior runs (data mutation), NOT by any code regression. To fully reset: mongo shell drop test_database + restart backend to re-seed. Migration @jamacademy.com -> @rgpacademy.com is idempotent (only fires when jam users still exist). Payment/Zoom/Resend still MOCKED as documented in iterations 1-3.
rca of the issue: N/A — no bugs found in scope of iteration_4. The 8 legacy regression failures are caused by (a) prior-test data mutation leaving <2 batches per course, and (b) one legacy assertion `assert 'JAM' in response.text` on the API root which is now legitimately gone after the rename. Neither is a code regression.
